description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a landscaped yard with numerous trees and a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a dark gable roof, white exterior walls, and multiple symmetrically arranged windows. The front entryway is accentuated by a set of steps, a small porch, and decorative columns. The backyard includes a patio area and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by hedges and additional greenery. The property is enclosed by a combination of fencing and natural tree lines, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living spaces.
description: A spacious two-story house with a dark gable roof, white walls, symmetrical windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, porch, and driveway lined with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and extensive tree coverage around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, swimming pool, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool area, fencing, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, decorative columns, and a paved approach
